##MAJNODES
IST097I DISPLAY ACCEPTED
IST350I DISPLAY TYPE = MAJNODES
IST075I NAME             STATUS
IST486I VTAMLST          ACT/S
IST486I NCPMAJ           ACTIV
IST486I APPLMAJ          INACT
IST314I END
##VTAMOPTS
IST097I DISPLAY ACCEPTED
IST1188I VTAM OPERATOR START OPTIONS:
IST1189I NODETYPE = NN       CPNAME = NN01
IST1189I NETID    = USIBMSC  SSCPID  = 1
IST314I END
